partner.name: Regulated Partner Sandbox
partner.product_boundary: Parallax does not custody assets, provide broker services, or bypass partner controls.

regulatory_obligations.control: Production routing requires a registered/regulated execution partner; Parallax is not a broker.
Partner handoff requires documented financial and regulatory risk controls before any market-access route.
Review assignments, approvals, and supervisory decisions must be reconstructable.
Tickets, approvals, submissions, and post-trade reviews are retained in the local execution ledger.
